data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Encrypts data both at rest and in transit to protect sensitive information.
data.technical_spec: AES-256 encryption for data at rest, TLS/SSL for data in-transit.

data.title: Intrusion Detection Systems
data.description: Detects unauthorized access or anomalies in the network.
data.technical_spec: AWS GuardDuty, VPC Flow Logs, anomaly detection algorithms.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Designed to mitigate distributed denial-of-service attacks.
data.technical_spec: AWS Shield, rate limiting, Web Application Firewall (WAF).

data.title: Access Control
data.description: Strict access control policies to prevent unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: IAM roles and policies, multi-factor authentication (MFA).

data.title: Security Audits and Compliance
data.description: Regular security audits to ensure compliance with industry standards.
